title: Add swipe-to-delete gesture on route cards

AC1_swipe_reveals_delete_area.details: SwipeableRouteCard wraps cards with Swipeable from react-native-gesture-handler. renderRightActions shows red delete area with trash-can-outline icon.

AC2_swipe_or_tap_opens_dialog.details: onPress on delete action and onSwipeableOpen both trigger handleSwipeDelete which opens DeleteRouteDialog with route name.

AC3_confirm_triggers_soft_delete_undo.details: handleDeleteConfirm calls softDelete.run() then shows Notifier with undo capability matching US-028 flow.

AC5_semantic_theme_tokens.details: Delete background uses semantic.color.danger.default (theme's error color set), icon uses semantic.color.onSecondary.default (white).

pre_existing_issues: Jest transform failures for @expo/vector-icons (unrelated to US-029)
